caption: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a black t-shirt, stands in a kitchen with a blue-curtained window behind her. In a smaller inset window, she is shown holding a metal pot. The main scene focuses on a large silver pot filled with a thick, yellow liquid, likely a sauce or batter. An immersion blender is being used to stir and mix the contents. As the sequence progresses, the imagery becomes heavily fragmented and distorted, with shards of the video shifting and overlapping. Despite the visual glitches, the woman remains visible in the inset, continuing to hold the pot, while the immersion blender remains positioned inside the yellow mixture in the main view. The background shows a kitchen counter with various cooking utensils and equipment, though the digital corruption obscures many of the specific details.
